name: Foaster
long_description:
Foaster is an AI-native consulting firm.

Traditional consulting firms rely on teams of analysts and associates to spend weeks or months gathering information, interviewing employees, structuring findings, and producing recommendations. That model can produce valuable work, but it is slow, expensive, and limited by the amount of human time that can be deployed on each engagement.

At Foaster, AI agents do most of the analytical work. They interview employees at scale, reconstruct how the organization actually works, identify bottlenecks and inefficiencies, and generate recommendations. A human consultant then reviews the output, challenges the reasoning where needed, and delivers the final recommendations to the client. That consultant also helps improve the system over time.

This means dramatically less human time is required to deliver high-quality consulting work. What used to require months of work from entire teams can now be done in a few days with one consultant supported by AI.

The result is a model that is faster, more precise, and more affordable than traditional consulting. For example, building a tailored AI roadmap for a company can be done in a few days instead of months.

Because our agents can process far more organizational detail than a traditional team could realistically gather and analyze, we can reach a level of speed and precision that classical consulting firms struggle to match.
